description: Create new branch and verify baseline. Create branch feat/eval-pressure-anomaly-leverage from current HEAD. Install project in dev mode and run existing tests to confirm green baseline.
steps: Create git branch feat/eval-pressure-anomaly-leverage from current HEAD of feat/stabilize-and-package-v2
Install project in dev mode: ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pip install -e '.[dev]'
Confirm all tests pass (should be 4+ tests in tests/test_eval_runners.py, tests/test_concept_engine.py, tests/test_task_ingress.py)
acceptance_criteria: New branch feat/eval-pressure-anomaly-leverage exists and is checked out
All existing tests pass with exit code 0
findings: All 15 tests pass (test_concept_engine: 8, test_eval_runners: 4, test_task_ingress: 3). Branch created from feat/stabilize-and-package-v2 at commit e6762f9. Project installs cleanly with pip install -e .[dev]. Python 3.12.13 confirmed working. pytest 9.0.3 in use. Note: contribution_requirements mandate Arabic documentation and 'Legitimate Theft' source attribution for all new mechanisms.
